forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 60. North wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 70. North wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

weather_report:
As night enfolds Boston, the horizon is draped in a gentle gray cloudiness, punctuated by the soft glow of city lights beyond. A hush settles over the landscape, with a mild temperature around 60 degrees persisting in the stillness of the hour. The north wind whispers softly through the trees, carrying the scent of spring, hinting at the prospect of the day to come. 

Anticipation hangs in the air like the promise of rain, lingering around the 40% chance of scattered showers after the sun nudges its way past the horizon at 11 AM. The clouds may play coy, but amidst the shifting light, pockets of sun will peek through, offering fleeting glimpses of warmth as the day unfolds toward a high of about 70. This atmosphere calls for comfort; a light jacket paired with breathable layers to adapt to shifting temperatures might be just the ticket. As the world awakens, a walk along the Charles, a quiet moment in a café indulging in the rich aroma of freshly brewed coffee, or perhaps tending to the garden with the gentle hope of rain nurturing the earth could frame your morning. Embrace this nuance, as May gives way to the reluctant, yet welcoming, warmth of summer.
